goal: Favor stable, efficient small fixed-wing UAV candidates using rough CFD ranking evidence.

adaptive_promotion_policy.behavior: Run first-pass rough scoring by default for broad exploration. Use expanded survivor sweeps only for deliberate baseline-building or promoted candidates.

first_pass.purpose: Rough scoring for most plausible candidates using enough alpha points to assess level-flight lift, L/D breadth, and high-alpha dependence.
first_pass.rejection_policy: Reject only clearly bad results such as missing forces, solver failure, non-positive lift at all sampled alphas, negative/invalid drag, or absurd coefficients. Treat pitch moment concerns as soft review until the expanded sweep runs.

survivor_expanded.purpose: Stronger rough polar scoring for candidates that survive the first pass.

alpha_policy.why: A single alpha can rank a candidate at one condition, but rough optimizer scoring should prefer a small polar sweep so L/D, lift margin, and Cm trend are not one-point artifacts.

user_tuning_notes: Increase efficiency_l_over_d to bias harder toward endurance.
Increase pitch_moment_trim to prefer easier-to-trim/stabler candidates; keep this modest for thrust-vectored concepts.
Increase low_drag to bias toward speed or lower power draw.
Increase high_abs_cm detractor weight or lower its start/limit only if pitch-moment estimates become more trustworthy or thrust-vector authority is limited.
Increase high_alpha_required to penalize candidates that need excessive cruise angle of attack.
Increase level_flight_lift_shortfall to reject candidates that do not reach required level-flight CL in the sampled alpha range.
Increase curve_consistency or weak_ld_curve_consistency to prefer broad, forgiving L/D curves over narrow high-alpha peaks.
Increase coefficient_instability or solver_residual detractors if noisy solver runs are contaminating ranking.
Increase surface_deviation detractor if geometry-capture risk should dominate ranking.
Adjust cl_target, cl_min, and cl_max after angle-of-attack and mission conventions are formalized.
This is rough optimizer scoring, not final engineering scoring.
